pricing.notes: No annual discount as of last check.

usage_limits.notes: Community-observed ~45 messages per 5-hour window. Anthropic does not publish hard limits; actual count varies by message length and model load.
~5x more usage than Free tier per Anthropic docs. Exact limit not published as a hard number; varies by model and context length.

pricing.notes: Max plan: ~5x usage vs Pro. A $200/mo tier (20x Pro) was also advertised.

usage_limits.notes: Community-observed ~225 messages per 5-hour window (~5× Pro). The $200/mo tier is ~20× Pro (~900 messages/5h). Anthropic does not publish hard limits.
~5x Pro usage at $100/mo tier; ~20x Pro at $200/mo tier. No hard token cap published.
160 messages per 3-hour rolling window on standard advanced models. GPT-4o-class messages are more generous and undisclosed. Limits may adjust dynamically.
3,000 Thinking messages per week — separate bucket from the 160/3h standard limit.

ide_integrations: VS Code (Copilot mode requires separate plan)

pricing.notes: $10/mo or $100/yr. Annual saves ~$20/yr.

usage_limits.notes: Pro plan includes $15/mo of AI Credits billed at published model API rates. IDE code completions remain unmetered. Usage-based billing effective 2026-06-01; annual subscribers retain legacy pricing until renewal.

pricing.notes: $39/mo individual plan; includes the highest monthly AI-credit allotment and access to all frontier models.

usage_limits.notes: Pro+ plan includes $70/mo of AI Credits billed at published model API rates. IDE code completions remain unmetered.

pricing.notes: $100/mo individual plan; highest AI-credit allotment for individual developers.

usage_limits.notes: Max plan includes $200/mo of AI Credits billed at published model API rates. IDE code completions remain unmetered.

pricing.notes: $20/mo or $192/yr ($16/mo). Annual saves $48/yr.

usage_limits.notes: Cursor advertises 'unlimited' tab completions, but that is autocomplete, not agentic coding. The agentic coding cap is the 500 fast-request/month limit below (Cursor has since moved Pro to a usage-based $20/mo compute allowance).
$20/mo compute allowance billed at published model API rates. Tab completions remain unmetered. Additional compute available at pay-as-you-go rates.

pricing.notes: Part of Google One AI Premium. Includes 2TB storage and other Google benefits.

usage_limits.notes: No hard limit published. Subject to fair-use rate limits. Gemini 2.5 Pro has larger daily allowance than free.

features.notes: Includes Deep Research agent, extended Gems, Google Workspace integration.

pricing.notes: ¥59/mo. USD equivalent ~$8/mo at ~7.27 CNY/USD as of June 2026; actual USD price for international users may differ. Verify at kimi.ai/pricing.

usage_limits.notes: Kimi Code quota refreshes every 7 days from the subscription date (unused quota does not carry over) and is rate-limited within a rolling 5-hour window (~300–1,200 requests/window across tiers, up to 30 concurrent), sharing the monthly Kimi membership quota. Per-tier exact allotment is not publicly disclosed; coding usage is never unlimited.

pricing.notes: ¥199/mo. USD equivalent ~$27/mo at ~7.27 CNY/USD as of June 2026. Verify at kimi.ai/pricing.

usage_limits.notes: Kimi Code quota refreshes every 7 days from the subscription date (unused quota does not carry over) and is rate-limited within a rolling 5-hour window (~300–1,200 requests/window across tiers, up to 30 concurrent), sharing the monthly Kimi membership quota. Per-tier exact allotment is not publicly disclosed; coding usage is never unlimited.

pricing.notes: $10/mo or $100/yr. Shared GitHub Copilot Individual subscription — also unlocks Copilot in VS Code, JetBrains, etc.

usage_limits.notes: Same GitHub Copilot Pro entitlement ($10/mo): $10/mo of token-metered AI Credits at published API rates (usage-based billing effective 2026-06-01); no fixed request quota for agentic coding. IDE/Xcode completions remain unmetered. Annual subscribers retain legacy request-based pricing until renewal. Advertised 'unlimited' applies only to completions, never agentic coding.

features.notes: Subscription covers all Copilot integrations. Xcode support is one of several IDE options.

pricing.notes: $14.99/mo or ~$9.99/mo billed annually (~$119.99/yr). Verify at mimo.org/pro for current pricing.

usage_limits.notes: Mimo Pro is an educational/learning platform; advertised 'unlimited' refers to course-catalog and AI-tutor-explanation access, not agentic code generation. No coding-output usage limit is published.

features.notes: Full course library, AI explanations, offline access, certificates of completion. Educational platform — not for production code generation.

pricing.notes: 500 Flow credits per month for agentic sessions. Unlimited autocomplete.

usage_limits.notes: 500 Flow credits per month. Each Flow = one agentic coding session using SWE-1 or other models.

features.notes: Pro plan gives 500 agentic Flow credits per month and priority access to models.

pricing.notes: $35/seat/month. 1000 Flow credits per seat per month.

usage_limits.notes: 1000 Flow credits per seat per month. Team admin dashboard included.

features.notes: Teams plan includes 1000 agentic Flow credits per seat, team dashboard, and SSO.
